summary: Phase 3 Compliance File Serializer - All 27 backend tests passed (100%). The dual-row serializer correctly returns serializer_version: dual_row_v1, explicit row_type (evidence|check|form_acknowledgement), allowed_actions arrays, readiness flags (affects_readiness, is_supporting_evidence), blocker_text, counts, check_data, acknowledgement_data, and summary with blocking_items.
critical_code_review_comments: Serializer correctly implements dual-row model with evidence and check rows paired via paired_check_key/paired_evidence_key
Evidence rows correctly set affects_readiness=false and is_supporting_evidence=true
Check rows correctly set affects_readiness=true and include blocker_text when not verified
Address Verification correctly shows X/2 format with verified_count/required_count
Agreement rows correctly use row_type=form_acknowledgement with acknowledgement_data including version, completion_mode, verification_status
Summary correctly includes blocking_items array with section and row_key for each blocker
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from Phase 1 & 2 for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Compliance File Serializer fully tested. GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file returns dual_row_v1 format with sections: right_to_work, dbs, identity, proof_of_address, agreements, references, training. Each section with 'rows' array contains evidence and check pairs. Evidence rows have counts (active_files, verified, awaiting_verification, pending_requests, history). Check rows have check_data (method, outcome, checked_at, checked_by), follow_up_info, migration_info. Agreement rows have acknowledgement_data (version_acknowledged, completion_mode, verification_status). Address Verification shows X/2 format. Summary includes blocking_items with section and row_key.

row_type_evidence.details: Evidence rows have row_type: evidence, affects_readiness: false, is_supporting_evidence: true

row_type_check.details: Check rows have row_type: check, affects_readiness: true, is_supporting_evidence: false

allowed_actions.details: All rows have allowed_actions array with appropriate actions (upload, add_file, request, verify, record_check, update_check, view_history)

evidence_counts.details: Evidence rows have counts: active_files, verified, awaiting_verification, pending_requests, history

check_data.details: Check rows have check_data with method, outcome, checked_at, checked_by

follow_up_info.details: Check rows have follow_up_info field (null or object with label, date, days_until, is_overdue, is_due_soon)

acknowledgement_data.details: Agreement rows have acknowledgement_data with version_acknowledged, completion_mode, verification_status

address_verification_format.details: Address Verification shows X/2 format with verified_count/required_count in counts and status_summary

migration_info.details: Check rows have migration_info field for migrated records

summary_blocking_items.details: Summary includes blocking_items array with section and row_key for each blocker

blocker_text.details: Check rows have blocker_text when not verified, null when verified

paired_keys.details: Evidence rows have paired_check_key, check rows have paired_evidence_key

api_verification.GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file: 200 OK - Returns dual-row serializer format with all required fields
